import io
import string
import list

fn is_ws_byte(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

fn is_ws_at(_ s: String, _ i: Int) -> Bool
  match string.byte_at(s, i)
  when Some(b)
    is_ws_byte(b)
  when None
    false
  end
end

fn get_tok(_ text: String, _ starts: List<Int>, _ ends: List<Int>, _ k: Int) -> String
  match starts.get(k)
  when Some(s)
    match ends.get(k)
    when Some(e)
      string.substring(text, s, e)
    when None
      ""
    end
  when None
    ""
  end
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let text = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(text)

  mut starts: List<Int> = []
  mut ends: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    while i < n and is_ws_at(text, i)
      i = i + 1
    end
    if i < n
      let s = i
      while i < n and not is_ws_at(text, i)
        i = i + 1
      end
      starts = list.push(starts, s)
      ends = list.push(ends, i)
    end
  end

  let count = starts.len()
  mut best_idx = 0
  mut best_count = 0
  mut k = 0
  while k < count
    let tok_k = get_tok(text, starts, ends, k)
    mut is_first = true
    mut j = 0
    while j < k
      let tok_j = get_tok(text, starts, ends, j)
      if tok_j == tok_k
        is_first = false
      end
      j = j + 1
    end
    if is_first
      mut c = 0
      mut m = k
      while m < count
        let tok_m = get_tok(text, starts, ends, m)
        if tok_m == tok_k
          c = c + 1
        end
        m = m + 1
      end
      if c > best_count
        best_count = c
        best_idx = k
      end
    end
    k = k + 1
  end

  let answer = get_tok(text, starts, ends, best_idx)
  println("top=#{answer}=#{best_count}")
end
